description: Designed graphic for ICE's VOICE (Victims of Immigration Crime Engagement) office, in vertical format. The right two-thirds is a warm-toned stock photograph of two people's clasped hands, one person holding another's hand with both hands, in a soft indoor setting. The left third is a semi-transparent blue overlay panel bearing white text: 'If you're the victim of a crime linked to immigration, we're here to' followed by the word 'HELP' in large bold white caps. An orange angled shape sits at the lower right. A white footer bar runs across the bottom: at left in blue and orange is the contact information '1-855-48-VOICE' and 'ICE.GOV/VOICE'; at right is the VOICE logo (a stylized blue and teal checkmark-shaped 'V') with the wordmark 'VOICE / VICTIMS OF IMMIGRATION CRIME ENGAGEMENT.'
notable_text: If you're the victim of a crime linked to immigration, we're here to HELP; 1-855-48-VOICE; ICE.GOV/VOICE; VOICE - VICTIMS OF IMMIGRATION CRIME ENGAGEMENT
